name: agent-harness
description: Multi-agent workflow harness with 3-layer quality gates (mechanical + structural + LLM review). Thin orchestrator enforces Plan → Generate → Verify → Evaluate phases with model-tiered sub-agents. Includes safe refactoring, staged migration, hypothesis-driven debugging, automated test generation, team knowledge base, code review, and markdown optimization for Claude Code. For teams that want reviewable AI automation without custom infrastructure.
